title: Scour. Broker. Ascend.
description: The void does not hand out trophies—it rents them. Stock your warband from sealed caches and open listings, flip surplus into credits, and harden a list that survives the ladder's grind.

features.title: Grow Your Arsenal
features.description: Stack depth across releases and seasonal drops. Every new pull widens the lines you can run when the meta tilts overnight.

features.title: Surgical Shopping
features.description: Skip the noise. Filter the catalog, zero in on the missing link, and buy exactly the piece your curve has been begging for.

features.title: Crack the Vaults
features.description: Rip sealed products and chase the spike. Each unopened cache is a dice roll toward a chase card or a bulk haul you can trade away.

features.title: Chase the Apex
features.description: Hunt foils, epics, and signature prints—the kind of pull that rewrites a deck overnight and makes opponents pause on turn one.

features.title: Cash the Excess
features.description: Duplicates and dead slots still have value. List them, fund the next upgrade, and keep your binder lean for the decks you actually play.

features.title: Tune the Warband
features.description: Prototype lists in the deck lab—test counters, stress synergies, and lock a 30-card answer to the ladder's current bullies.

tiers.title: Foundation Pieces
tiers.description: Workhorse units and utility spells that glue a list together—cheap enough to craft around, flexible enough to slot into multiple strategies.

tiers.title: Pivot Cards
tiers.description: Standout prints with real board impact—alternate arts, foil shine, and effects that reward players who build around them.

tiers.title: Finishers
tiers.description: High-impact bombs and combo engines that close games or flip a losing board. One well-timed cast can end the duel.

marketCta.description: Thousands of listings live right now—find the card that completes your next list.
